seo_description: Current time in Taipei, Taiwan — live China Standard Time (CST, UTC+8) clock, no DST, and time differences with Tokyo, Hong Kong, Singapore, and world cities.

faq.question: What time is it in Taipei right now?
faq.answer: Taipei, Taiwan uses China Standard Time (CST, UTC+8) year-round. Taiwan does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Taipei is on the same offset as Beijing, Hong Kong, Singapore, Manila, and Perth (Australia). The IANA timezone identifier is Asia/Taipei.

faq.question: What time zone is Taipei in?
faq.answer: Taipei is in the UTC+8 time zone (China Standard Time, CST — also called Taipei Standard Time). Despite the name 'China Standard Time,' this is used by Taiwan independently. Taiwan does not observe DST and stays at UTC+8 year-round. The IANA identifier is Asia/Taipei, which distinguishes it from mainland China's Asia/Shanghai.

faq.question: Does Taipei observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Taiwan does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Taipei remains on UTC+8 year-round. Taiwan abolished DST in 1979. This means Taipei's offset never changes — it is always 8 hours ahead of UTC, 13 hours ahead of New York (EST), and in sync with Hong Kong, Singapore, and Beijing.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Taipei and Tokyo?
faq.answer: Taipei (CST, UTC+8) is 1 hour behind Tokyo (JST, UTC+9). Japan does not observe DST, so this 1-hour gap is constant year-round. When it is 10:00 AM in Taipei, it is 11:00 AM in Tokyo.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Taipei and New York?
faq.answer: Taipei (CST, UTC+8) is 13 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US Daylight Saving Time (EDT, UTC-4), Taipei is 12 hours ahead of New York. Since Taipei has no DST, the gap varies based only on US clock changes.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Taipei and London?
faq.answer: Taipei (CST, UTC+8) is 8 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During UK summer (BST, UTC+1), Taipei is 7 hours ahead of London. Taipei has no DST, so the gap changes only when London transitions.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Taipei?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Taipei are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CST (UTC+8), Monday through Friday. Taiwan Stock Exchange (TWSE) operates 9:00 AM to 1:30 PM CST. Taipei is a global hub for semiconductor manufacturing (TSMC, MediaTek), electronics, and technology. Many tech companies operate extended hours given global supply chain coordination needs.

faq.question: Is Taipei time the same as Hong Kong time?
faq.answer: Yes. Taipei (Asia/Taipei, UTC+8) and Hong Kong (HKT, UTC+8) are on the same time offset year-round. Neither observes DST. When it is noon in Taipei, it is also noon in Hong Kong. Taipei also shares UTC+8 with Singapore, Beijing, Manila, and Perth.
